basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 12 Anganwadi Helper and Workers Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 12 Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 minimum, maximum graduation. Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th standard.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Merit based on marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jklcds.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 minimum, maximum graduation. Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th standard.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on marks Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.jklcds.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JK Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the JK Anganwadi recruitment is 15th July 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers)?
faq.answer: For the post of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers), candidates must have completed at least 10+2 education, with a maximum qualification of graduation. This ensures a basic level of education for the role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for these Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts under this recruitment is between 18 years (minimum) and 37 years (maximum). Specific age relaxations may apply as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi jobs?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the JK Anganwadi recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempt from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be done for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JK Anganwadi recruitment will be based on merit, determined by the marks obtained by the candidates. This will be followed by a document verification stage.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 12 vacancies have been announced for the JK Anganwadi recruitment. These vacancies are distributed between Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the JK Anganwadi recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the qualification required for Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers)?
faq.answer: For the post of Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers), candidates must have completed Matriculation or at least the 8th standard. This is the minimum educational requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: The official website where candidates can download the application form for the JK Anganwadi recruitment is www.jklcds.com. Ensure you download the form from this authentic source.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions. The jobs offered by Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi under this notification are on a contract basis.
